prompt: A brightly lit Japanese television variety show set with two young female idols standing side by side behind a small white podium, framed in a medium shot from about waist-up. Both wear matching light gray school-uniform-style blazers with silver buttons, white dress shirts, gray striped ribbon ties, and coordinated name tags pinned to their left chest, with subtle lace detail visible at the waistline. The woman on the left has dark brown to black hair styled in a side braid draped over her right shoulder, hands clasped together in front of her chest, and a slightly angled body posture facing right. The woman on the right has long dark wavy hair falling over both shoulders and rests both hands lightly on the top of the podium. Their faces are obscured by soft rectangular blur blocks. The background is a colorful, dense TV studio design: on the left, a tall pink glitter panel filled with repeating white icons including hearts, triangles, snowflake-like flowers, and tree silhouettes, bordered by ornate gold trim; in the center, a vivid red-orange vertical panel with partial white lettering behind the presenters; on the right, a yellow wall with metallic geometric decorations and a large curved brown mosaic arch studded with small reflective squares. Include 3 visible on-screen text areas: a top-left show logo in Japanese reading 日向坂で会いましょう in a playful blue-and-white badge, a top-right headline banner in Japanese with two lines reading ガッツリ褒められ隊を攻略せよ！『褒め褒めストラックアウト』 in bold white and blue outlined text, and a lower-left black placard with red border containing Japanese text and a large score reading 9 pt. The left name tag reads 1 member name in Japanese, 高瀬 愛奈, and the right name tag reads 1 member name in Japanese, 小坂 菜緒. Render it as a crisp broadcast screenshot with vivid studio lighting, saturated colors, realistic fabric texture, authentic Japanese TV graphics, and a polished entertainment-program look.
